query:
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN scheduledDropoffAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN pickupContactName VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN pickupContactPhone VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN dropoffContactName VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN dropoffContactPhone VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN customerName VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN travelRouteData JSON NULL;
